title: boucerosia quadrangula
intro: Boucerosia quadrangula, also known as Quadrangular Prickly Ash, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which make it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Boucerosia quadrangula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
